message.content:
@startuml
actor Service
participant "Access token guard" as Guard
box "Auth microservice" #GreenYellow
participant "Session module" as Session
participant "Auth module" as Auth
end box

Service -> Guard : request
Guard -> Guard : get headers
Guard -> Guard : check authentication header existence

alt [Authentication header is undefined]
  Guard --> Service : 401
end

Guard -> Guard : get access token from header
Guard -> Auth : validate access token
Auth --> Guard : result of validation

alt [Access token is Invalid]
  Guard --> Service : 401
end

Guard -> Auth : get embedded client id from access token
Auth -> Auth : extract id

alt [Client id is missing]
  Auth --> Guard : error
  Guard --> Service : 401
end

Auth --> Guard : client id
Guard -> Guard : modify request with client id
Guard --> Service : modified request

@enduml
